raw_comment: I believe that young men don't contact their parents as much because of the stereotypes of the male figure being able to do it themselves and that they are strong and don't need help from anyone, much less their parents. However there are also stereotypes of the female figure being responsible for taking care of the parents. Personally though, I'm going to be the young man who contacts and sees their parents all the time.
ace_sentences: I believe that young men do not contact their parents as much.
I believe that the stereotypes say that the male figure is able to do it themselves.
I believe that the stereotypes say that young men are strong.
I believe that the stereotypes say that young men do not need help from anyone.
I believe that young men do not need help from their parents.
Stereotypes of the female figure exist.
The stereotypes say that the female figure is responsible for taking care of the parents.
Personally, I am going to be a young man.
I am going to contact my parents all the time.
I am going to see my parents all the time.
